name: somacosf--improve-skill
description: Meta-skill: evaluate any Factory Droid skill against the current project codebase and suggest concrete improvements. Use when: a skill feels incomplete, produces suboptimal results, doesn't cover edge cases in the current project, or the user wants to tighten skill-project fit. Analyzes skill definition, supporting files, invocation history, and codebase structure to produce actionable upgrade recommendations.
